---
title: "Pipeline Operations T Demo"
format: html
filters:
  - tlang
---

# Introduction

This demo showcases advanced pipeline manipulation operations in T, such as `filter_node`, `mutate_node`, `rename_node`, and `chain`.

# Pipeline Metadata

T allows converting a pipeline's definition into a DataFrame for introspection.

```{t}
#| label: pipeline-meta
p = pipeline {
  raw = read_csv("data/sample.csv")
  summary = raw |> filter($value > 10)
}

# Introspect nodes
df_nodes = pipeline_to_frame(p)
df_nodes
```

# Conclusion

The T language treats pipelines as first-class objects that can be transformed and composed programmatically.
